title: Completed Studio Data Sharing Architecture Boundary
summary: Completed the Studio Data Sharing architecture boundary by moving shared workflow dispatch, registry/config, path contracts, and documents/tags adapters under the headless data-sharing subsystem while keeping Studio as the owner of Data Sharing pages and same-origin API endpoints.
effect: Data Sharing no longer depends on Docs Viewer HTTP endpoints for prepare, returned-package listing, review, or apply; document workflows still use docs-aware helper modules for generated reads, source writes, backups, and rebuild follow-through, and runtime artifacts now use var/studio/data-sharing/<domain>/ roots without old export-import compatibility reads.
verification: SDSA-014 recorded focused Studio API tests plus Docs Management non-publication assertions plus prepare/review mock and block smokes plus route-level Data Sharing smokes against /studio/api/data-sharing/...
SDSA-015 is a docs/log slice; Codex did not manually rebuild Docs Viewer generated doc/search payloads and local docs-watcher output from source doc changes is expected.
